title: Featured Causes
para: This year has been like no other. We've carried out a record-breaking number of relief activities

causes.title: Rebuild Gaza
causes.para: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done regularly, even if small. (Bukhari, 6465)

causes.title: Give Zakat
causes.para: "Zakat is for the poor, the needy, those in debt, and in the cause of Allah."Surah At-Tawbah (9:60)

causes.title: Give Sadaqah
causes.para: "Whatever you spend in Sadaqah, Allah will replace it; and He is the Best of Providers." Surah Saba (34:39)
